text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur and I are on our way back from an
outing when she gets a message on her phone.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's nothing serious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I have a match scheduled in an online game later,
but we're short a player.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's supposed to be three-on-three, so if we're
down a player, the whole thing's out the window.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...You?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What use would a noob like you be? Or do you
think it's no big deal because it's a game?
choice_data_list:
Can't you handle a little dead weight on your
team?

Can't you handle a little dead weight on your
team?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I'll just fill the roster and try my best not
to get in the way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm not totally opposed to playing with a
handicap...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You can play, but you've gotta do what I say.
Don't do anything stupid, okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Right-click to aim, and left-click to shoot. Move
using the W, A, S, and D keys. You can learn the
more complex controls as we go.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just don't walk into our line of fire. Right, let's
move out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bratatatatata!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's one kill. So far, so good.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Ah, crap! I completely forgot about Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I guess that was really no joke about staying out
of my way. And yet...)

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...So that's the kind of person you are, huh? You
can't recognize talent unless it's got an official
seal of approval on it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell'd you just say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Okay, let's all calm down!"

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Whenever I'm about to clash with someone,
Trainer steps in without hesitation.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. There's one by you. Left-click to
shoot!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, we won.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I struggled to even move at first, but by the end
of the match, I manage to help our team secure
the win!
choice_data_list: I think I might be a natural...
I think I might be a natural...

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text:
Hey, couldn't you have taken that last one
yourself? You let your trainer have it on purpose,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No idea what you're talkin' about. Probably just a
coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, right. That was really out of character for
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's why I said I didn't do it.
choice_data_list: I'll be sure to pull my weight next time.

How much practice do I need before I get that
good?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought you weren't even interested in this
game...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Weirdo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is just playing a game, doing something
with Air Shakur proves to be time well spent.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ha, fat chance.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The only thing you're allowed to do is sit there
and keep your mouth shut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to when she used to say I was "freaking
annoying" or "couldn't take a hint," I feel like
we've gotten a little closer today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I went outta my way to practice or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just analyzed the program for a bit to get a feel
for the designer's style.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What's with the look? It's not like that's illegal or
anything... technically.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm scared to dig any deeper, but I'm once again
reminded of how relentlessly Air Shakur pursues
her hobbies.
